description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through the windows, and a small protruding section that may serve as a sunroom or enclosed porch. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical patterns, with some rooms having floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, with a focus on open-plan living and efficient use of space. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large black-framed windows arranged in varied patterns. The design is minimalist and functional, emphasizing open spaces and natural light.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entry, large windows, and a protruding side section with additional glazing.
description_view_1: Side elevation highlighting the long, continuous wall with multiple large windows and a flat roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying smaller windows and the back entry, with the protruding section visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side elevation with a similar flat wall, large windows, and a clear view of the house's linear layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door with large adjacent windows, no porch or overhang, emphasizing minimalism and accessibility.
